'''Gespo Bomu''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] soldier. He was a member of the [[Bomu Clan]] and occasionally worked form [[Zonnos Anjiliac Priare|Zonnos the Lesser]] of the [[Anjiliac]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]].

Some accounts suggest that Gespo and his relative, [[Hreeda Bomu]], were hired to avenge the death of two other Bomus, pirates [[Heedron Bomu|Heedron]] and [[Ormann Bomu|Ormann]], who had been killed when trying to stop the rescue of Zonnos' brother [[Mika Anjiliac Chiera|Mika]]. Gespo and Hreeda went to [[Endregaad]] and ambushed the rescuers, trying to "finish the job". However, others believe that Heedron and Ormann had not died in the first place and were the ambushers at Endregaad.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tempest Feud]]'' {{1st}}
